theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury) with accents of Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon)
theme_and_archetype.description: A cinematic, dark, futuristic, and premium 3D supercar showroom. Relies heavily on lighting, textures, deep shadows, and neon/metallic highlights.

rules.headings: Tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter), aggressive wide appearance, primarily uppercase for small labels (tracking-[0.2em]). Limit max H1 to text-6xl for elegance.
rules.body: Clean, highly legible geometric sans, leading-relaxed for long text, high contrast.
rules.dashboard_numbers: Unbounded or JetBrains Mono for technical specs and animated counters.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

surface_strategies.floating_panels: Glassmorphism (The 'Crystal' Variant) heavily used over 3D scenes. bg-black/40 with backdrop-blur-2xl, 1px border-white/10, shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)].
surface_strategies.bento_grids: For performance and models section. Dark flat backgrounds, subtle 1px border-white/5, hover triggers glowing neon borders (e.g. border-[#E4FF1A]/50).
surface_strategies.hotspots: Glowing circular rings using absolute positioning and ping/pulse animations over the 3D canvas.

layout_and_spacing.hero: 100vh height, absolute positioned UI layered over the React Three Fiber canvas. UI elements pinned to corners/edges with generous padding (p-8 to p-12).
layout_and_spacing.sections: Scroll-based transitions. Use spacious gaps (gap-8 to gap-16).
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 for the performance dashboard. Dense data, sleek gauges.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align text for readability on floating panels, center hero text if symmetrical.

scene_setup.canvas: Full screen fixed or sticky canvas behind content.
scene_setup.lighting: Cinematic. Dramatic spotlights, Environment preset='night' or custom studio lighting. Soft shadows.
scene_setup.environment: Reflective floor, fog (fog color #050505), particles for atmosphere.

interactions.scroll: Use ScrollControls from @react-three/drei for camera movement mapping to scroll.
interactions.hover: Hover tilt on cards (Framer Motion whileHover={{ scale: 1.02, rotateX: 2, rotateY: 2 }}).
interactions.hotspots: Clickable 3D objects mapping to HTML overlays (using <Html> from drei).

component_guidelines.buttons: Ghost or glassy by default with primary accent border on hover. text-sm uppercase tracking-widest. Animated neon glow effect on active states.
component_guidelines.customizer: Sidebar or bottom panel using Shadcn UI components (Tabs, Radio Groups, Sliders) heavily customized with glassmorphism to blend with the 3D scene.
component_guidelines.dashboard_counters: Large Unbounded typography with glowing text-shadow, powered by count-up animations.
component_guidelines.booking_form: Shadcn Form embedded inside a dark glass panel, input fields with bg-white/5, border-white/10, focus:border-[#E4FF1A].
component_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, hotspots, customizer options) MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='explore-showroom-btn').

3d_models.instruction: Use a placeholder free glTF supercar model from a CDN, or construct a stylized abstract vehicle silhouette using basic Drei shapes if model fetch fails. Ensure the material reflects environment lighting (MeshPhysicalMaterial with high metalness and clearcoat).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize React Three Fiber canvas as the base layer of the application (z-index 0).
2. Layer standard DOM UI over the canvas using Framer Motion for entrance animations.
3. Implement scroll-linked camera animations using @react-three/drei ScrollControls.
4. Construct the customizer state globally to immediately update 3D model materials (color, rims).
5. Ensure deep contrast: avoid pure black/white, use tinted obsidians and stark neon highlights.
6. Adhere to data-testid requirements for all UI.
